title: PREVENTION AND EDUCATION - 211info
text: YOUTH OUTPATIENT PREVENTION AND EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community prevention education for substance misuse, gambling/gaming, and suicide. Also offers mentoring programs for youth with a focus on building confidence and life skills. 548 SE Jackson Street Roseburg, OR 974705412 Eligibility: Education: Unrestricted Youth Mentoring: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 672-2691 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 229-8934 Main phone Main phone (541) 672-2691 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, and Josephine Counties Services: Mentoring Programs * Youth Issues Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Gambling Issues Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Substance Use Disorder Issues Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Suicide Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH RESIDENTIAL AND OUTPATIENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUTH OUTPATIENT
